ideation: This animation sequence simulates the action of holding a telephone to one's ear and speaking.  The robot will hold the phone to its right ear, using its right arm. The left arm will remain in a relaxed position at its side.  We'll create a natural-looking sequence by starting with the arm at rest, moving to the phone-holding position, and then showing a slight adjustment for comfortable conversation. The final frame will show a slightly more relaxed posture, suggesting the conversation is ongoing. The robot does not have hands or fingers so we will simulate holding the phone by positioning the arm accordingly.

frames.beat: right arm lifts, bringing phone to ear
adjusting grip, settling in for a call
holding phone to ear, ready to talk
